resolution: Both maintainer blockers addressed in commit 3d437f3: B1 reserved-keyword error now points to the sub-table user should use; B2 anonymous-vs-named URI mismatch error lists declared providers and both fix paths. Symmetric named-vs-anonymous error also added.
out_of_scope_finding_for_issue_4: Architect flagged that internal/workspace/override.go doesn't merge override.Env.Secrets.Values — only Env.Vars is merged. This is a dormant merge gap surfaced by Issue 3's schema addition. Must be fixed in Issue 4 resolver/merge integration.
advisory_deferred: pragmatic: VaultRegistry.IsEmpty() has no callers (speculative); redundant len check in coerceDescriptionMap; MaybeSecret.MarshalText unused
architect: MaybeSecret Plain XOR Secret not mechanically enforced (public fields); extractProviderName could route through vault.ParseRef
maintainer advisory: KnownProviderNames nil-safe call pattern; scaffold template visual separator; stale (Issue 4) pointer comments
